source_jobs.title: UGC Creator Manager
source_jobs.description:
WE'RE LOOKING FOR A UGC CREATOR MANAGER TO BUILD THE CREATOR ENGINE BEHIND OPAL'S PAID GROWTH.



Role Title: UGC Creator Manager

Team: Marketing - Paid Performance




WHO YOU WILL WORK WITH:

 - Manager: Marjolaine

 - Key Cross-Functional Collaborators: Elise (Creative Strategist, owns concept and asset production) and Yunshu (UA Manager, owns media strategy and spend)

Location: Paris (Hybrid, 3 days onsite) or Remote




WHY OPAL?

 - Mission-Driven Impact: We are on a mission to help 1Bn people to focus better every day. We’ve empowered our community to save 150M+ hours and counting.

 - Ownership & Flexibility: Structure your work to foster creativity and productivity.

 - Collaborative Culture: Work with a small, high-impact team that gathers quarterly for meetups and learning. Nearly $1M in Revenue per Employee.

 - Growth & Recognition: Join a top-30 US productivity app with competitive compensation and early equity. 4.8/5 rating on 60k+ reviews.

 - Well-Supported: Backed by world-class investors and founders of companies like Pinterest, Snapchat, and Revolut.
   
   


WHY THIS ROLE AND WHY NOW?

We help people reclaim their attention from the feeds that are built to take it. The catch: to reach them, we have to meet them where they already are, on TikTok, Reels, and Shorts. So we make scroll-stopping content with intent, content good enough to earn a stop and then point someone back toward their real life. That tension is the heart of this role, not a problem to hide from. Done well, an Opal ad is the rare thing in the feed that helps you put the phone down.

We're scaling paid acquisition hard, and creative is the lever. The more quality creatives we test, the more winners we find, the lower our CACs go, and the more we can spend efficiently. Right now our paid team can only move as fast as our creative pipeline allows. You're here to remove that ceiling, and to do it without losing the plot on why people use Opal in the first place.

This is an operator role. You'll build the UGC creator engine from scratch, run it at high volume, and keep it improving. Elise focuses on concept and strategy, Yunshu focuses on campaign optimization, and you make the volume happen.

You'll be the first dedicated hire for this function, with the autonomy to design how it works.




WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

 1. Build and run a high-volume creator network. Source, vet, and manage a roster of UGC creators across TikTok, Instagram, and creator marketplaces. Negotiate rates, manage contracts, handle creator admin end to end, and keep testing new platforms to find better sourcing channels.

 2. Orchestrate production at scale. Write sharp briefs tied to specific personas, pain points, and markets (Parents, Sleep and more). Run many creators in parallel without losing quality or momentum, and make sure every deliverable clears our bar before it reaches the paid team.

 3. Close the performance feedback loop. Push real-time creative performance back to creators (what won, what didn't, why), design simple incentives that drive iteration, and feed insights to the team to shape the concept and testing roadmap.

 4. Think across the funnel and into new markets. Understand the path from ad to App Store to install to onboarding to trial to subscription, and propose improvements at every step. When we open a new market, find local creators, adapt formats, and lead the localized test.

 5. Own the budget and the system. Track spend per creator, optimize for cost-per-winning-creative, and build lightweight processes that let you move fast without bureaucracy.




WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE IN 6 MONTHS:

A reliable pipeline producing 50+ creatives per week across personas and angles, feedback loops that lift win-rate over time, creators sourced and onboarded for at least one new market or persona, and a paid team that's never waiting on creative volume to scale.




WHAT YOU BRING

 - 2+ years working with UGC creators, influencer campaigns, or content p

source_jobs.title: Marketing Artist Intern
source_jobs.description:
MARKETING ARTIST INTERN


Team: Growth, Paid Performance

Who You Will Work With

 - Manager: Elise (Creative Strategist)

 - Key collaborators: Yunshu (UA Manager) and Marjolaine (Marketing Director)




WHY THIS ROLE AND WHY NOW?

Opal helps millions of people use their phone less. To get there, we need creatives that stop the scroll. That's the real challenge: making ads that earn attention, without wasting it.

We're currently scaling our paid acquisition, and the single biggest lever is creative volume and velocity. The more quality creatives we test, the more winners we find, the more efficiently we grow.

Now this is where you come in: we're looking for a Marketing Artist Intern to help us produce engaging paid social creatives, short-form videos and statics.

You'll work directly with the creative team, get your hands on real campaigns from day one, and see your work go live across Meta, TikTok and Google.

This is a hands-on production role. You'll be making creatives end-to-end, not just briefing them: editing, assembling, and occasionally shooting simple social content in office or home-style settings. It's a great fit if you live on social platforms, and want to learn how creative drives growth at a fast-moving consumer app.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Produce ad creatives: edit short-form videos, UGC-style hooks, and statics that feel native to each platform and resonate with our audience.

 - Shoot your own content: film and propose fresh creative ideas.

 - Adapt for every channel: tailor and optimize creatives for platforms like Meta, TikTok, Google, and beyond 🚀

 - Localize ads: adapt and localize creatives to fit the needs of different campaigns and markets.

 - Feed the testing engine: prepare and upload assets into live campaigns, keep batches moving, and make sure deliverables are accurate and on time.

 - Track & learn from performance: review campaign results, gather insights, and suggest creative improvements to boost impact.

 - Iterate on winners: take proven creatives and spin up variations, iterating on winners consistently beats starting from scratch.

 - Stay on top of trends: hunt for what's working on socials (hooks, formats, creators) and bring fresh references to fuel the next batch.

 - Collaborate & experiment: work closely with the marketing team to brainstorm, test, and refine formats.




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - English proficiency: you understand the language, tone, and cultural references of social platforms.

 - Loves shooting & ideating: you enjoy being behind the camera and proposing new creative ideas, not just executing a brief.

 - Hands-on with CapCut & Figma: comfortable editing and designing in both.

 - Social media expert: you live on TikTok, Reels and Shorts. You know how to benchmark, what's trending, and what a strong hook looks like.

 - Adaptable: you can switch angles, formats, and personas quickly as testing priorities shift week to week.

Nice to have

 - Notions of UA / paid social (enough to read basic performance signals like hook rate, CPI, CVR).

 - After Effects and Photoshop.

 - Interest in motion design and creative tooling.




WHY IT'S A GREAT INTERNSHIP

 - You'll learn the full loop 'concept → production → test → performance' at a fast-moving consumer app.

 - A creative team that iterates fast, shares performance openly, and treats creative as the #1 growth lever.




WHY OPAL

We're on a mission to help 1 billion people focus better every day. Our community has already saved 500M+ hours and counting. Opal is a top-30 US productivity app with a 4.8/5 rating across 60k+ reviews, backed by founders of Pinterest, Snapchat, and Revolut.




PRACTICAL DETAILS

 - 📅 Duration: 6 months, starting as soon as possible

 - 🕐 Hours: 7h/day, Monday to Friday (35h/week)

 - 📍 Location: Paris 2e, on-site

 - 💰 Gratification: €800 to €1,000/month depending on profile

source_jobs.title: Communications Manager
source_jobs.description:
WE'RE LOOKING FOR A COMMUNICATIONS MANAGER TO SHARE OPAL’S STORY TO THE WORLD.




WHO YOU WILL WORK WITH:

 - Manager: Kenneth Schlenker, our CEO

 - Key Cross-Functional Collaborators: our marketing team (socials, brand) and leadership


LOCATION: REMOTE, EAST COAST, USA (WITH BI-ANNUAL TRAVEL TO EUROPE)





WHY OPAL?

 - Mission-Driven Impact: We are on a mission to help 1Bn people to focus better every day. We’ve empowered our community to save 500M+ hours and counting.

 - Ownership & Flexibility: Structure your work to foster creativity and productivity.

 - Collaborative Culture: Work with a small, high-impact team that gathers bi-annually for meetups and learning. Nearly $1M in Revenue per Employee.

 - Growth & Recognition: Join a top-30 US productivity app with competitive compensation and early equity. 4.8/5 rating on 60k+ reviews.

 - Well-Supported: Backed by world-class investors and founders of companies like Pinterest, Snapchat, and Revolut.
   


WHY THIS ROLE AND WHY NOW?

Screen time has become one of the defining issues of our era, affecting more than 5 billion people who carry a smartphone every day.

We are in the middle of a civilization-scale shift in how humans interact with technology, in how we work, learn, focus, and build relationships.

Public awareness is rising fast. Media coverage is accelerating. Regulators around the world are paying attention, and conversations about digital wellbeing now reach parents, students, professionals, educators, and policymakers alike.

The largest technology companies Apple, Google, OpenAI, Anthropic, recognize the importance of this space and are increasingly positioning themselves around healthier technology use. Apple just made Screen Time one of the headline features of its upcoming OS release.

Opal is uniquely positioned to become the defining brand of this generation in digital wellbeing and intentional technology use. We've built one of the largest communities in the category, with more than 10 million users, including world-class artists, athletes, entrepreneurs, and creators. We have a product people genuinely love, recognized as an Apple Design Award finalist, backed by exceptional investors who have supported us with more than $10 million in funding.

At the same time, partnership, media, and communications opportunities are arriving faster than we can capitalize on them. Inbound requests come from journalists, creators, schools, companies, researchers, and organizations that want to work with us.

We need an exceptional person to own these opportunities, build meaningful relationships, and help shape Opal into the leading global brand for healthier technology use.

This role is central to our journey to reach and positively impact 1 billion people.


Here's why this is the right moment to join:

 - You'll own something real: No playbook to inherit. You're writing it and the story is genuinely good.

 - The moment is now: The cultural conversation around attention, AI, and screen time has never been louder. We're already positioned at the center of it.

 - You'll work at the center of it: Directly with Kenneth, with our brand and growth teams, and with the journalists, creators, and voices shaping how people think about focus and technology.
   


WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

As our Communications Manager:

 - Deploy and own Opal's PR and media strategy end-to-end: the right stories, the right outlets, the right moments, across tech and lifestyle press, Substacks, podcasts, and wherever our audience actually pays attention

 - Seek out and build high-profile partnerships with media brands and organizations that align with Opal's mission

 - Work with Kenneth on media placement and speaking opportunities: knowing which conferences, panels, and formats actually move the needle

 - Develop a program of high-profile Opal ambassadors from our community: artists, athletes, creators, and builders who genuinely use and believe in the product

 - Track, amplify, and

notes: No tech roles posted, but company mission and product suggest a tech core.
